subject: [PATCH v2 18/21] nfsd: initialize DRC hash table before registering shrinker

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server code where the DRC hash table is not fully initialized before it becomes visible to the shrinker, causing a NULL dereference on weakly-ordered architectures. The fix involves moving the initialization of the bucket list heads and the drc_hashsize store before registering the shrinker. This ensures that the hash table is properly initialized before it can be accessed by the shrinker.
